# Proquoment

> Proquoment is AI enabled procurement solution for buyers to source from multiple manufacturers and suppliers from the globe. From design to Delivery.

## What We Do
- Buyers submit RFQs (Request for Quotations) and get matched with Indian suppliers
- Suppliers list products and bid on buyer requirements
- AI assists in matching, quoting, and communication

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://proquoment.in
- Buyer Dashboard: https://buyer.proquoment.in
- Supplier Dashboard: https://supplier.proquoment.in
- Contact: https://proquoment.in/contact
